zh.lifeSummary: 當Guda van Valckenburg於1048年10月14日出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 施塔德施塔德時，她的父親Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou31歲，母親Irmentrud Van Zutphen29歲。她於大約1064年與Siegfried II de Walbeck結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1125年6月30日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福蓋爾德沃爾貝可享年76歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福蓋爾德沃爾貝可。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Guda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guda van Valckenburg was born on 14 October 1048, in Stade, Stade, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, was 31 and her mother, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, was 29. She married Siegfried II de Walbeck about 1064. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 30 June 1125, in Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 76, and was buried in Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guda van Valckenburg est née le 14 octobre 1048, à Stade, Landkreis Stade, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Siegfried II de Walbeck environ 1064. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 juin 1125, à Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guda van Valckenburg am 14. Oktober 1048 in Stade, Landkreis Stade, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou 31 und ihre Mutter Irmentrud Van Zutphen 29. Sie hat um 1064 Siegfried II de Walbeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juni 1125 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guda van Valckenburg è nata il il 14 ottobre 1048 nel Stade, Landkreis Stade, Niedersachsen, Germania, sua padre, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Siegfried II de Walbeck circa 1064. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 30 giugno 1125, nel Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Guda van Valckenburgが1048年10月14日にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス スタドスタドで生まれた時，父Rupert I von Opper-Lahngouは31歳，母Irmentrud Van Zutphenは29歳であった。約1064年にSiegfried II de Walbeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1125年6月30日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブジェルデルンワルベックで76歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブジェルデルンワルベックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guda van Valckenburg(이)가 1048년 10월 14일 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 스타드 스타드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irmentrud Van Zutphen(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1064년 Siegfried II de Walbeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1125년 6월 30일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브 글더 월벡에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브 글더 월벡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guda van Valckenburg nasceu em 14 de outubro de 1048, em Stade, Landkreis Stade, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Irmentrud Van Zutphen, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Siegfried II de Walbeck aproximadamente 1064. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de junho de 1125, em Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guda van Valckenburg родилась 14 октября 1048 г. в местности стад, ландкрис стад, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Rupert I von Opper-Lahngou было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Irmentrud Van Zutphen, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Siegfried II de Walbeck около 1064 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 июня 1125 г. в местности вальбекк, джелдирн, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности вальбекк, джелдирн, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

Se casó con Siegfried II de Walbeck aproximadamente 1064. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de junio de 1125, en Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Walbeck, Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
